---
title: Troubleshooting Access
---
Sometimes you can run into errors that leave the server inaccessible by SSH. In that case you could first try to reboot the server from the OpenNebula Console. 

## Reboot
Log in to the [OpenNebula Console](https://one.labs.vu.nl), with your VUnetId as username.

::: {.callout-important}
To access the web interface from outside the VU campus use [EduVPN institute access](https://vu.eduvpn.nl).
:::

- Go to Instances > VMs and double-click your VM

![Reboot](/public/tools/scicloud/reboot.png)
- Click on the reboot button. _Reboot_ will try to stop running software first, _Reboot Hard_ will immediately shut down the server.

## Viewing the Server Console
If the system is still inaccessible you can check if there are any errors in the boot process, by viewing the server console.

![VNC](/public/tools/scicloud/vnc.png)
- Click on the button with the screen and click VNC

![Server console](/public/tools/scicloud/server-console.png)
You will see the screen output of the server as if you had connected a monitor to it.
